scripts.dev: pnpm supabase status --workdir ../.. >/dev/null 2>&1 || pnpm supabase start --workdir ../.. && pnpm supabase status --workdir ../.. && node -e "console.log('Supabase is running. Press Ctrl+C to stop the dev stack.'); setInterval(() => {}, 2147483647)"
scripts.supabase:start: pnpm supabase status --workdir ../.. >/dev/null 2>&1 || pnpm supabase start --workdir ../..
